## Description

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation / CI update
- [ ] Refactor / Chore

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] `make test-python` passes
- [ ] `make lint-python` passes
- [ ] `make lint-web` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing (describe below)

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (ruff + prettier)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] Any documentation has been updated accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
